ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Provides a relevant response within the context of duty and conditions, but could be more natural in tone to match persona.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>Short note: Lacks relevance to current situation; does not align with the Frontier Ranger's mission-focused nature and fails in persona consistency.
